# TrustOS AI

> AI-powered digital trust verification: scan websites, emails, passwords, payment screenshots, QR codes, documents and deepfakes before you trust them.

TrustOS AI helps everyday users decide what is safe online. The platform combines reputation signals, AI vision, and language analysis to flag scams, phishing, fraud, and tampered media in seconds.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of TrustOS AI scanners and how digital trust verification works.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to start running scans.
- [Performance report](/performance): Lighthouse metrics before and after our hero image optimization.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public pages.
- [Robots](/robots.txt): Crawler rules for this site.
